pkgmetadata.longdescription: BaiduPCS-Go is a command-line client for Baidu Network Disk written in Go. It supports authenticated login, file upload and download with multi-connection acceleration, recursive directory operations, share-link and rapid-link transfer to the user's own storage, and offline (cloud) downloads.
BaiduPCS-Go 是一款使用 Go 语言编写的百度网盘命令行客户端。 支持账号登录、多线程加速上传与下载、目录递归操作、分享链接 与秒传链接转存到自己的网盘，以及离线（云端）下载等功能。
